themes.label: Creation
themes.summary: This chapter underscores creation, the heavens and earth, or God’s creative ordering work. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 6 verses. Commentary leans on "And he shall give Israel up because of the sins of Jeroboam, who did sin, and who made Israel...". Word-study detail reinforces "וַיַּ֨עַשׂ: made - to do or make, in the broadest sense and widest application".
